query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)

  ('Viscosity', 'Property of fluid that resists the force causing it to flow', 'The author hoped the new policy would viscosity tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Vivacity', 'Liveliness', 'Her vivacity became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Vivid', 'Bright or lifelike', '“She had a vivid imagination.”', 'adjective', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Vivify', 'To bring to life', 'Critics argued that the plan might vivify the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Vivisection', 'The action of cutting into or dissecting a living body', 'Her vivisection became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Vocable', 'Able to be uttered', 'The author hoped the new policy would vocable tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Vocation', 'A particular occupation, business or profession, calling', 'The essay highlights the vocation of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Vociferate', 'To speak or cry out loudly', 'Critics argued that the plan might vociferate the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Vociferous', 'Loud and forceful', '“The crowd was vociferous in its demands.”', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Vogue', 'Something in fashion at a particular time', 'Her vogue became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Volant', 'Having extended wings as if flying', 'The passage presents a volant portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
